title: Phase 1.1: Create data/ standards files (11 files)

notes:
✅ COMPLETE: All 11 data/ standards files created for LRB agent workflow.

Files created:
1. persona-properties.md — Four-field persona system (role, identity, communication_style, principles)
2. principles-crafting.md — Agent principles design and validation guide
3. communication-presets.csv — Reusable communication style templates for agents
4. agent-architecture.md — Agent structure decisions (hasSidecar decision matrix)
5. agent-compilation.md — Agent compilation process and validation
6. agent-menu-patterns.md — Menu design patterns and best practices
7. agent-metadata.md — Metadata field specifications and validation
8. agent-validation.md — Comprehensive validation checklist (7 stages)
9. brainstorm-context.md — Agent ideation and design framework
10. critical-actions.md — Critical actions guide (initialization + restrictions)
11. understanding-agent-types.md — Agent type decision framework (stateless vs sidecar)

All files include proper BMAD file references and are tailored for Linkright context (paths, modules, terminology).

title: Phase 1.2: Agent-Infrastructure Integration Guide (5 files)
description: Create infrastructure integration patterns for LRB agents: agent-orchestration.md (lr-orchestrator routing), agent-mongodb-patterns.md (signal/JD/resume CRUD), agent-chroma-retrieval.md (semantic query patterns), agent-beads-integration.md (task creation/dependency binding), agent-mcp-tools.md (n8n and external tool access). These patterns enable agents to interact with Linkright's data and workflow layers.

title: Phase 1.3: Sync Module Agent Specifications (7 files)
description: Create detailed agent specifications for 8 Sync agents: sync-parser.spec.md, sync-scout.spec.md, sync-linker.spec.md, sync-inquisitor.spec.md, sync-refiner.spec.md, sync-sizer.spec.md, sync-styler.spec.md. Each spec includes: persona, infrastructure dependencies (MongoDB collections, Chroma queries, Beads task triggers), menu items, critical actions, and integration with lr-orchestrator/lr-tracker. DEPENDS ON: Phase 1.2 (infrastructure patterns).
close_reason: Completed all 9 agent specifications as per implementation plan.

title: Phase 1.4: Multi-Agent Workflow Patterns (3 files)
description: Create multi-agent coordination patterns for Sync module: agent-handoff-protocol.md (state passing between agents, Beads dependency chaining), agent-error-recovery.md (fault tolerance, retry logic, escalation to user), agent-state-machine.md (status flow across agents: extract→inquisitor→linker→refiner→sizer→styler). Patterns enable agents to work as orchestrated system rather than isolated tools. DEPENDS ON: Phase 1.3 (individual agent specs).
close_reason: Created all 3 multi-agent coordination pattern files for the Sync module.
